title: Chapter analysis pipeline: Chs 1 (Feklyunina) + 2 (Morozov)

fields.vision: This is a reusable chapter-analysis pipeline applied to the first two chapters of the Routledge Handbook of Russian Foreign Policy.
fields.mechanism: The mechanism is method operationalization: name the analytic technique, define its use condition, connect it to a case or judgment problem, record failure modes, and decide whether it is a live method page or a reference packet.
fields.source_utilization: Intelligence tradecraft, counterintelligence, and analytic method. Use source library intelligence titles as method authority and intelligence-domain stressors. Vision: Present intelligence pages as disciplined analytic-method and tradecraft demonstrations. Mechanism: Tie claims to collection, covert action, deception, interrogation, bias-control, and analytic-logic mechanisms. Plan: Prioritize Capstone, SATS, CI, RAG integrity, and analyst-assurance pages for close-reading. Status: source library identified as candidate scholarly support; direct quotation requires exact passage review. Remaining gap: Need method-passage extraction and claim-to-source linkage. Source pool: 60 deduplicated local title candidates; 63 catalogue support rows. Examples: Improving Intelligence Analysis; Leading Intelligence Analysis. source library scholarly-source routing with author correction. Raw filenames often append Nik_Murano and are not treated as authorship evidence. Catalogue rows are preferred for authors where available. This strengthens page vision, mechanism, source-use, plan, and gap language, but it does not certify passage-level citation support. source-library controlled content is source evidence for internal scholarship and planning; do not redistribute source files or long excerpts in the public package.
fields.plan: How this briefing says the vision should be accomplished, translated into a public project route. For each new chapter N: (1) create chapter_XX_*/ folder; (2) produce analysis.md using templates/standard_chapter_schema.md; (3) produce metadata.json; (4) append row to master_tracker.csv; (5) update cumulative_synthesis_seed.md with new themes, overlaps with prior chapters, tensions/contradictions, implications for book-level thesis; (6) update cross-chapter comparison matrix where relevant. Wire or preserve the implementation files: None. The pipeline is documentation-only; the schema file IS the "tool" a human or model uses.
fields.remaining_gaps: Retain the packet as a completed authority layer, then decide whether it should remain a reference file or become a live room, method page, or public proof object.
fields.detailed_source_vision: This is a reusable chapter-analysis pipeline applied to the first two chapters of the Routledge Handbook of Russian Foreign Policy. The scope is explicitly limited: it is NOT an analysis of the whole book, but the first increment of a workflow designed to be repeated chapter-by-chapter. The deliverable-level goal is to let a new reader/researcher/model continue the project cold, without re-reading chat context. The structural innovation is a reusable schema + cumulative synthesis seed combination: every chapter gets the same 12-section analysis, each chapter adds a row to a master tracker CSV, and each chapter triggers an update to a whole-book synthesis seed that grows monotonically. By the time later chapters are processed, the synthesis seed will contain the cumulative map of themes, tensions, and provisional book-level thesis. Chapters 1-2 are the seed state.
fields.detailed_source_mechanism: The mechanism is method operationalization: name the analytic technique, define its use condition, connect it to a case or judgment problem, record failure modes, and decide whether it is a live method page or a reference packet.

maintenance_rule: Update this blueprint before strengthening public claims on the website. Do not use word count, module count, or status percentage as a substitute for concrete project substance.
claim_ceiling_rule: Public claims may rise only when the built components, source use, status, and remaining gaps are updated here and reflected in the rendered page.

public_standard_check.Vision: This document supports the public account of Blueprint by preserving the project purpose, reader-facing claim, and professional-portfolio role.
public_standard_check.Mechanism: It connects source material, project components, implementation state, and next actions so the work can be inspected rather than merely asserted.
public_standard_check.What is built: The supporting evidence is the named page, blueprint, packet, project file, source record, or implementation page described in the document.
public_standard_check.Source use: Sources are used as method and source background, domain grounding, or project history; direct quotation and stronger factual claims require passage-level review.
public_standard_check.Plan: Bind claims to exact source anchors, visible implementation evidence, or a narrower public claim.
public_standard_check.Status: Current support record for the professional package unless explicitly marked archival.
public_standard_check.Remaining Gaps: Passage-level source check, implementation verification, citation cleanup, and proportional public wording remain open where evidence is incomplete.

public_pitch.what_it_is: This is a reusable chapter-analysis pipeline applied to the first two chapters of the Routledge Handbook of Russian Foreign Policy.
public_pitch.distinctive_mechanism: The mechanism is method operationalization: name the analytic technique, define its use condition, connect it to a case or judgment problem, record failure modes, and decide whether it is a live method page or a reference packet.
public_pitch.why_it_matters: It links regional knowledge to analytic method by preserving source lineage, strategic frame, adversary logic, and claim limits for later Russia/security work.
public_pitch.pitch_integrity_note: Mechanism-first public pitch inserted after the Nexus Lab mechanism-erasure audit on 2026-05-13; source basis: blueprint detailed source fields.

pitch_integrity_audit.standard: object, distinctive mechanism, value, built state, and non-overclaim discipline must be visible.

researcher_process_map.final_use_case: It links regional knowledge to analytic method by preserving source lineage, strategic frame, adversary logic, and claim limits for later Russia/security work.
